title: The Chute
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Quote|Cut the gab, Ninx! I'm comin' in! ''Open the Chute!''|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] to [[Shug Ninx]]|<ref name="Dark Empire 3">[[Dark Empire 3|''Dark Empire'' 3]]</ref>}}
[[File:The_Chute.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] chases the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] down The Chute.]]
'''The Chute''' was the name given to the narrow, approximately 1.6 kilometer long tunnel that was the only entrance to [[Shug Ninx]]'s [[Spacebarn]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].

==History==
The Chute was originally a prototype for a section of the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]] that had been disposed of in an industrial junkyard on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Bonadan/Legends|Bonadan]]. When Ninx found it, he appropriated it, disassembled and reassembled it on Nar Shaddaa. In addition to the navigational hazards posed by the Chute's narrow walls, Ninx made it considerably more dangerous for uninvited guests by installing security [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] along its length. Among the finishing touches to the Chute was a [[holograph]]ic advertisement that disguised its entrance.

When [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] returned to Nar Shaddaa in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], he was pursued by several [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] into the Chute. One bounty hunter, piloting a [[CloakShape fighter/Legends|Cloakshape]] fighter, managed to follow the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] into the Chute, but was killed by Ninx's turbolasers. When Solo departed from Ninx's garage after visiting it for the second time that year, the bounty hunter [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] flew [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']] into the Chute and damaged his ship when it collided with the ''Falcon''.

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire 3|''Dark Empire'' 3]] {{1st}}
